title: microliabum glanduliferum
intro: Microliabum glanduliferum, also known as glandular microliabum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Microliabum glanduliferum include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Microliabum glanduliferum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and reduce inflammation.
